title: Add Coelenterazine-h
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"7l4ot","text":"Add Coelenterazine-h as the substrate (light-sensitive; prepare fresh on the day of use) to activate the full-length RenG luciferase and measure its maximum luminescence value. This serves as the relative standard for subsequent SLCA interaction signals. Since three configurations will be tested, record the strains and culture conditions to ensure consistency.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":4,"length":16}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"5g07v","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"e8r75","text":"Next, measure the luminescence intensity of the three SLCA constructs to compare their complementation efficiency and background signals, thereby establishing the optimal pairing of the SpyTag/SpyCatcher system and the positioning of the RenG fragments.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"42ila","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"62ja9","text":"SLCA assay 1: Full-length RenG fusion protein, serving as the maximum luminescence reference.","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":0,"length":13}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"1kfd2","text":"SLCA assay 2: SpyTag + RenG (N-terminal) with SpyCatcher + RenG (C-terminal).","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":0,"length":13}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"1nk4b","text":"SLCA assay 3: SpyTag + RenG (C-terminal) with SpyCatcher + RenG (N-terminal).","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":0,"length":13}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
materials_text: {"blocks":[{"key":"dqmpd","text":"Strains harboring expression plasmids with the following constructs (designed plasmids already introduced by electroporation):\n","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"eak3i","text":"      Full-length RenG\n","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":0,"length":22}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"egsat","text":"      SpyTag–RenG (NTD, aa 1–155) and SpyCatcher–RenG (CTD, aa 156–314)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":0,"length":33},{"style":"bold","offset":38,"length":33}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"arq2n","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"3bc2o","text":"      SpyTag–RenG (CTD) and SpyCatcher–RenG (NTD)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":0,"length":23},{"style":"bold","offset":28,"length":21}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"3a1ag","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"9rr0a","text":"THYE liquid medium (with appropriate antibiotic)","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":0,"length":18}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"16njs","text":"Coelenterazine-h (working range 2–10 µM, pre-dissolved in DMSO; optimize experimentally to identify an appropriate concentration for downstream use)","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":0,"length":16},{"style":"bold","offset":32,"length":7}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"2ap9c","text":"Sterile white 96-well luminometer plate (luminescence-compatible)","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":0,"length":39}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"f7sdn","text":"ddH₂O or PBS","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":0,"length":5},{"style":"bold","offset":9,"length":3}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: For each strain, pick a single colony and inoculate into THYE medium containing the appropriate antibiotic. Incubate overnight at 37 °C, 220 rpm .
The next day, dilute 1:50 into fresh THYE medium with antibiotic and continue incubation until OD₆₀₀ ≈ 0.4–0.6 (mid-log phase).
Dispense 100 μL of log-phase culture into each well of a white 96-well luminometer plate , preparing triplicates per condition.
In a separate row, dispense blank controls (medium only, no cells).
Prepare the Coelenterazine-h working solution at [ ] μM in DMSO (light-protected).
Quickly add 20 μL of Coelenterazine-h to each well (final concentration [ ] μM ) and mix immediately (gentle pipetting or plate tapping).
Within 3–5 minutes after substrate addition, measure luminescence for each well using a plate reader.
Record the raw RLU (Relative Light Units) for each well and subtract the blank (medium-only) background.
In SLCA assay 1 , the luminescence of full-length RenG is defined as the maximum (Max RLU) ; report other assay signals as Relative Activity = (sample RLU) / (Max RLU) .
creator: igemnthuth
